name: Purchase Invoice-task
label: Task (NMB Zone Visit)
description: Links this Purchase Invoice to a specific NMB Zone Task. Appears in Task Connections panel automatically. Auto-fills Project.

name: Purchase Invoice-task_details_html
label: Task Details
description: Read-only banner showing branch, fault, zone and status of the linked Task. Auto-populated by client script.

name: Purchase Invoice Item-task
label: Task
description: Override per line item if this item belongs to a different Task than the header. Leave blank to inherit the header Task.
